# Third-Party Benchmark Reports

This directory stores benchmark evidence generated by:

- `tooling/metrics/collect_third_party_benchmarks.py`
- `tooling/metrics/validate_third_party_benchmarks.py`
- `tooling/metrics/compare_third_party_benchmarks.py`

## Structure

- `quick/` - quick-profile latest report set
- `full/` - full-profile latest report set
- `history/` - timestamped immutable result snapshots
- `analysis/` - budgets, runbooks, and delta artifacts
